subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of God that draweth mankind nigh unto Him, and this is the Light of God that moveth before the faces of them that are brought near, and this is the Sun of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الله یقرب الناس الیه و هذا نور الله یمشی امام وجوه المقربین و هذه شمس الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
